quicksight.dashboard.samesheettargetvisu:
The configuration of the same-sheet target visuals that you want to be filtered.

This is a union type structure. For this structure to be valid, only one of the attributes can be defined.

quicksight.dashboard.samesheettargetvisu.Description: The options that choose the target visual in the same sheet.  Valid values are defined as follows:  +  `ALL_VISUALS`: Applies the filter operation to all visuals in the same sheet.
A list of the target visual IDs that are located in the same sheet of the analysis.
